name: Sauce Bechamel
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add flour and whisk until smooth.
3. Gradually add milk while whisking to avoid lumps.
4. Stir in salt and pepper.
5. Continue cooking until mixture thickens slightly.
6. Remove from heat and stir in grated Swiss cheese until melted.
